description: Skid-steer feasibility via Isaac Sim WheeledRobot API

flat_ground_spin.test: spin in place on flat surface

reactor_circle_drive.test: drive full circle around reactor (outer floor)
reactor_circle_drive.note: Tilt spikes when wheel grazes step edge, robot recovers

reactor_spin_at_step.note: Robot catches on step edge during rotation. Need ramp/bridge geometry.

key_insight: Raw USD DriveAPI does NOT propagate during simulation. WheeledRobot.post_reset() switches to velocity control mode via articulation controller, which is essential for wheel drives to work.
smooth_floor_note: Raw STL mesh (3.5M triangles) causes artificial roughness. Smooth annular floor planes added 0.3in above mesh to simulate real smooth graphite tiles. Reactor mesh collision kept for walls.
